channel.title: Reviews on Trek Relaunch Book Club
channel.description: Recent content in Reviews on Trek Relaunch Book Club

item.title: TNG: Death In Winter
item.description: This is a placeholder review. The real thing is coming soon! Kicking off the Star Trek: The Next Generation relaunch — a series of novels that continued the adventures of Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-E after the events of Star Trek: Nemesis — Death in Winter makes a bold move right out of the gate by changing one of the fundamental character relationships from the show… by finally pairing up Picard and Beverly Crusher.

item.title: Titan: Taking Wing
item.description: This book is next up to be read.
